From Tasks to Workflows — hands-on session guide with:
- Session timeline and agenda
- Traffic Light data safety reference
- Workflow Factory overview (6-phase process)

- PRD Requirements prompt with copy-to-clipboard
- Resources and next steps

EOF
)" && gh repo create joshuamtm/nyct-foundations-session2 --private --source=. --push 2>&1 | tail -5
